allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok' if 'entries' in d else d.get\('code','?'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\(f'Total: {len\(items\)} seats'\); [print\(f'  {s[\\"seat_no\\"]} \({s[\\"area\\"]}\) - {s[\\"business_status\\"]}'\) for s in items[:5]]; print\(f'  ... and {len\(items\)-5} more' if len\(items\)>5 else ''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\(f'Seats: {len\(items\)}'\) if items else print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False\)[:200]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\(f'OK: {len\(items\)} devices'\) if items or 'items' in d else print\(d.get\('code','?'\)\)")
